title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libuser bug fix and enhancement update

full_text:
An update for libuser is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.1 Release Notes linked from the References section.
